course_title: THEORY AND CONTROL OF SYNCHRONOUS MACHINES
description: The idealized three phase synchronous machine time domain model including saliency, time invariant form using Park's transformation, sudden short circuits and other transient conditions, reduced order models, excitation system and turbine/governor control, dynamics of multiple machine systems, transient stability and subsynchronous resonance.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: E C E 411and427, graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
